name: Full TypeScript Debt Triage
scope: Structural TypeScript triage after Settings and Reports cleanup
fixesApplied: Added a typed react-grid-layout declaration instead of leaving Dashboard dependent on implicit any module typing.
Normalized Dashboard loading state to a strict boolean contract.
Typed Dashboard layout id normalization to avoid implicit-any filter callbacks.
Aligned Customers installment status comparison with the Persian OverallInstallmentStatus union.
Repaired StylePanel against the real StyleContext contract: theme, setTheme and buttonRadiusPx.
Fixed Orb nullability and MouseEvent listener typing without changing runtime animation behavior.
Restored Sidebar collapsed flyout pointer handlers and removed dead accent-only variables.
Aligned SmsHealthCheckPanel with the actual SmsBulkTestModal export surface.
Hardened backup schedule parsing against unknown settings payloads.
Removed safe unused default React imports where the automatic JSX runtime makes them unnecessary.
remainingDebtTrackedSeparately: Project-wide noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters cleanup remains a separate cleanup phase because many report/demo variables are intentionally present but currently unused.
Full AppRoutes/page-root typecheck remains expensive because importing the route manifest pulls most pages at once; route behavior is covered by route/RBAC/feature/navigation audits.
Build still needs to be run on the developer machine because this environment uses --ignore-scripts for sqlite3 and cannot fully emulate the native install/build path.
